satellite_data_plane.title: Connectra (sync.server) — contact/company store
satellite_data_plane.notes: GraphQL gateway (contact360.io/api) calls Connectra with X-API-Key; jobs use Redis Asynq + Postgres jobs table.

satellite_email_plane.title: email.server — finder / verify / patterns
satellite_email_plane.notes: Gin API + separate cmd/worker (Asynq). Gateway EmailServerClient; scheduler_jobs email_server poll GET /jobs/:id/status.

satellite_phone_plane.title: phone.server — verify / patterns / S3 jobs
satellite_phone_plane.notes: Gin API + cmd/worker. Gateway PhoneServerClient; paths /phone and /phone-patterns; jobs phoneapi_jobs.

satellite_storage_plane.title: s3storage.server — S3 objects + Redis job state
satellite_storage_plane.notes: Gin /api/v1 + cmd/worker Asynq. Gateway S3StorageEC2Client; jobs in Redis hashes not Postgres; default port 8087.

satellite_logs_plane.title: log.server — log ingest + S3 CSV
satellite_logs_plane.notes: Gin logsapi + cmd/worker Asynq. Gateway LogsServerClient; in-memory hot store + S3; no Postgres; default port 8091.

satellite_extension_plane.title: extension.server — scrape + save-profiles
satellite_extension_plane.notes: Gin + in-process pool; Gateway SalesNavigatorServerClient; persists via sync.server POST /internal/extension/upsert-bulk; cmd/worker stub; default port 8092.

satellite_ai_plane.title: ai.server — HF + VQL + chats
satellite_ai_plane.notes: Gin + Asynq worker; Gateway AIServerClient; Connectra VQL; optional Postgres ai_chats; default port 3000.

satellite_campaign_plane.title: campaign.server — campaigns + sequences
satellite_campaign_plane.notes: Gin + Asynq worker; Gateway CampaignServiceClient; Postgres campaigns/templates/sequences; default port 9800.

gateway_plane.title: contact360.io/api — GraphQL hub
gateway_plane.notes: Strawberry /graphql; Postgres gateway DB; optional phone + campaignSatellite + satelliteHealth; deploy api.contact360.io.

user_web_plane.title: contact360.io/app — user dashboard
user_web_plane.notes: Next.js 16; Bearer JWT to POST /graphql; app.contact360.io; ops/logs via admin.contact360.io.

admin_ops_plane.title: contact360.io/admin — DocsAI ops console
admin_ops_plane.notes: Django; session + gateway GraphQL; jobs scheduler; system status HTTP + satelliteHealth; deploy admin.contact360.io / 34.201.10.84; git docsai/docs.
